title: Deepfake - A Scam so Surreal
relevance_summary: Phishing with deepfake videos to deceive investors

prevention.rule: Block any tx from contracts associated with known phishing campaigns

monitoring_rules: Monitor for interactions with known phishing addresses
summary: DeTrade Fund used deepfake technology to create a fake CEO and deceive investors, raising 1,438 ETH before vanishing. A guard could have detected this by monitoring for unusual promotional activities and interactions with known phishing addresses.
